title: FLP's 21 scholars, 10 winners, and 5 fellows
primary_topics: FLP 2022 awards (scholars, dissertation winners, Esmel fellows)
sub_topics: three bar topnotchers rated 'Exemplary' (Domingo, Mata, Omamalin)
Entrepreneurship Fund P1B target for MSMEs
Esmel fellows' active assistance to MSMEs

stances.claim: Fidel V. Ramos was 'a gentleman-patriot' who fully respected his independence and probity — after offering him DOJ Secretary then a SC seat in June 1992, Ramos 'never spoke or influenced me, in any manner, in the discharge of my duties' even when CJ voted against Ramos's political wishes.
stances.rhetorical_move: obituary-like tribute + presidential-restraint anecdote (recurring set piece)

stances.claim: During the first decade (2011-2021), FLP concentrated on its liberty programs; during the next decade (2021-2031), it will include the prosperity side — starting with the Esmel fellowships.

The ultimate FLP projects are the Center for Liberty and Prosperity (housing the interactive Museum, in partnership with the Supreme Court) and the Entrepreneurship Fund (at least P1 billion, investing in and managing MSMEs with active assistance from Esmel fellows).
stances.rhetorical_move: structured-roadmap framing + integration of fellowship and fund (talent + capital)

events: Ramos's June 17, 1992 offer of DOJ Secretary to CJ

signature_phrases: he fully respected my independence and probity
even when I voted against his known political wishes
the prosperity side of its philosophy
to help the poor help themselves through private entrepreneurship
the active assistance of its Esmel fellows
register_markers: WITH CHIEF JUSTICE ALEXANDER G. GESMUNDO AS GUEST OF HONOR
IN PARTNERSHIP WITH THE AYALA CORPORATION
IN PARTNERSHIP WITH THE METRO PACIFIC INVESTMENTS FOUNDATION
More on him in another column
decision_framework_signals: applies gentleman-patriot / presidential-restraint framing for appointer-appointee relationships
uses decade-transition framing for institutional evolution (liberty-only → liberty + prosperity)
frames talent-capital integration (Esmel fellows + Entrepreneurship Fund) as the prosperity-side operating model
cross_references: More on him in another column
notable_anecdotes: Ramos's June 17, 1992 offer of DOJ Secretary which CJ declined on the grounds he did not campaign or vote for Ramos, leading to Ramos's subsequent SC appointment — a recurring set piece in CJ's autobiographical column corpus
